content:
From 0000008cb2049b59bc6474ddbd6343bf69c46abd Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
From: randymcmillan <randy.lee.mcmillan@gmail.com>
Date: Fri, 15 Sep 2023 16:58:30 -0400
Subject: [PATCH] 2097/710215/807869/00/00007b06/1694811505/gnostr.org

---
 patch.demo.sh | 2 +-
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/patch.demo.sh b/patch.demo.sh
index 87c5310..83c9aca 100755
--- a/patch.demo.sh
+++ b/patch.demo.sh
@@ -38,7 +38,7 @@ for td in .gnostr/ ; do
         for f in $PATCHES; do
 
             git apply --allow-empty  <(cat $f)
-            gnostr-legit . -p 00000 -m "$(date +%s)/$(pwd | grep -o '[^/]*$')" | gnostr-cat -u wss://relay.damus.io | $(grep 'OK' || echo 'working...')
+            gnostr-legit . -p 00000 -m "$(date +%s)/$(pwd | grep -o '[^/]*$')" | gnostr-cat -u wss://relay.damus.io | $(grep 'OK') || echo "working..."
 
         done
     done
--
libgit2 1.6.4
